task.question: What happens after the friends exit the vehicle in the rain?
options: A. Someone slams a car door.
B. Someone shoots a gun at the friends standing in front of the car.
C. Someone appears holding a lantern.
E. Someone slips and falls on the wet terrain.
initial_trace_steps: I watched the video and scrolled to the 01:52 time stamp. At this time, I see all four of the friends exit their vehicle as rain comes down outside. At 02:02, immediately after the previous scene concludes, a blonde man appears holding a lantern.
